'''Teks''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the agricultural [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Reytha]].

In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], Teks and its food storage facilities was one of several Reythan population centers that were taken by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] to disrupt the food supply. Teks was subsequently recaptured by a strike force led by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] during the [[Reytha campaign]].

==Behind the scenes==
Teks appears during the Darth Vader campaign in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. The campaign was also included in the game's [[2002]]
expansion pack, [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].
